Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Watchmen]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Six Watchmen wearing black coats are working around the heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — Watchmen are guardians who stand in the gap between normal people and unspeakable threats.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Watchmen are mining a crater on the island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Six Watchmen were digging at Nakothi’s Heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — The Watchmen aim to produce a series of disposable Emperors.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Bliss summoned Watchmen to secure the courtyard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Watchmen were wounded in the courtyard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — The assassin killed two Watchmen.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — There are Watchmen in the palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — The Watchmen were traitorous on Nakothi's island.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Watchmen are tending to the injured in the surgery.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — Watchmen used to man the fort on the island.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
